mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nurse_item(item_name, price, content, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{itemName}, #{price}, #{content}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE nurse_item
item_name = #{itemName}, price = #{price}, content = #{content}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE nurse_item SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM nurse_item WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM nurse_item WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
